top_signals.title: Australia's competition regulator takes Amazon to court over alleged unfair Prime subscription contract terms
top_signals.summary: Australia's competition regulator is taking Amazon to court, alleging its Prime contracts required subscribers to pay AU$2.99 to avoid advertising, with no option for refunds

top_signals.title: Godiva’s Japan lenders agree on 9-month loan extension
top_signals.summary: The chocolate maker posted a net loss of about ¥30 billion for the year ended December 2025.
